actions.action: Reply only where useful: ask people their 3 teams and include the free-picks link once.
actions.copy:
What are your 3 World Cup teams right now? I made mine here. Pick free first, ticket only if you want the paid leaderboard.

actions.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Dexter" --platform "X Search" --channel "World Cup 2026 prediction conversations" --status "posted" --attempt-url "https://twitter.com/search?q=%22World%20Cup%202026%22%20predictions&src=typed_query&f=live" --detail "public-url: X reply/post URL with code/link included at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST"
actions.proofInstruction: public-url: X reply/post URL with code/link included

actions.action: Open latest posts, reply only to real football discussion where pick-3 or prediction angle fits.
actions.copy:
